headline: Bride's 'No Kids' Wedding Had One Exception: Her Emotional Support Goat, Gerald
summary: Gerald wore a tiny tuxedo and ate the floral arrangements. The flower girl is still crying.
fullBody: Bride McGoat banned children from her wedding but brought her emotional support goat, Gerald. 'He's different,' the bride explained. Gerald ate the centerpieces, headbutted a groomsman, and loudly bleated during the vows. The flower girl (who was not invited) watched from outside and is still upset. Gerald has been named 'best goat' in a Facebook poll. The groom is allergic. He's now also allergic to the marriage.
